blockers.issue: Events NOT exported to JSONL — audit trail lost on roundtrip. export_jsonl() exports issues, deps, labels but omits events table entirely.

warnings.issue: next_child_number() read-then-write not atomic across processes — race condition if two agents create children for same parent concurrently
Blocked cache rebuild has inconsistency window — DELETE then INSERT means ready() queries during rebuild may return stale results
Dynamic SQL via f-string for column names in update_issue_fields — safe (keys hardcoded) but should add whitelist validation for defense in depth
JSONL import has no schema validation — accepts invalid status/types (CHECK constraints catch some at DB level but errors are opaque)
Cycle detection DFS has no depth/iteration bound — potential DoS on pathologically large graphs
claim_issue() should use BEGIN IMMEDIATE for explicit write lock during CAS operation
Import doesn't validate dependency foreign keys before insert — missing depends_on target can cause FK violation
get_stats() runs multiple queries without read transaction — counts may not sum consistently under concurrent writes
